design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed = hash(title + kind + audience + generated_at) -> selected architecture = workflow-command-center; AIDA Check: hero (Attention), proof + market context (Interest), workflows + motion (Desire), CTA band (Action); Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary, system fallback; Hero Math Verification: clamp(44px, 6vw, 72px) ensures 2–3 line headline at 1120px max-width; Bento Density Verification: .bento and .compare-grid include grid-auto-flow: dense; GSAP Motion Selection: image-scale-fade-scroll + hover-physics; Label Sweep & Button Check: primary CTAs black pill linking to Super app, secondary white pill with contrast verified.
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A premium niche landing page for creators and coaches who want to turn calls, DMs, and voice notes into durable content and repeatable operations using personal AI agents that can operate real software and reuse a computer-use cache.
